title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
